title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-28
body:
Our team has completed a review of the recent abuse queue. Here is a summary of actions taken:

BAN: One account (spam_wave_42) was permanently banned for distributing phishing links across 6 channels in under 20 minutes. We take security threats extremely seriously.

WARNINGS ISSUED:
- toxic_runner: Repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. Further violations will result in a ban.
- new_member_17: Off-topic post in #introductions. Please keep posts channel-relevant.
- bot_like_user_77: Repeated near-identical automated-looking replies in help channels. Continued behavior may result in further action.

NO ACTION (reports closed):
- A report against a trusted community helper was reviewed and closed — it arose from a moderation disagreement, not a policy violation.
- A high-severity report against a core maintainer was identified as a coordinated false-report (brigading) campaign following a legitimate moderation decision. No action was taken against the maintainer.

We remain committed to a safe, welcoming, and fair community. Abuse of the report system is itself subject to moderation.

— Community Moderation Team
